name: codex-inline-default-agent-model
title: Codex: revert dispatch default to inline + sub-agent model config
description: Fix #459: revert codex dispatch_mode default from auto to inline (0.6.8 regression: sub-agents silently inherit the expensive main-session model); add codex.agents.model / model_reasoning_effort config rendered into the three trellis-*.toml so opt-in sub-agent users can route sub-agents to a cheaper model (also covers the model-config item of #442). Ship as 0.6.9.
creator: taosu
